ops.title: getaway v2: establish Python CLI project (cli/)
ops.description: Per approved v2 plan (plans/our-scripts-workflows-etc-sharded-biscuit.md): uv project under cli/ (uv_build, flat layout, click, httpx; pytest/respx/ruff/ty dev), constants.py + paths.py (GETAWAY_HOME + flock atomic_update), click group skeleton with exit codes 0/1/2/3/4/64 (UsageError remapped to 64). Invocation: `uv run --project "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cli" getaway`.

ops.text: uv run --project cli getaway --help exits 0 from a fresh checkout
uv run --project cli pytest, ruff check, and ty check all green
cli/getaway/{constants,paths,cli}.py exist with atomic_update flock helper and exit-code mapping
